description: Step into a world of elegance with this 3 BR, 3 Bath townhome, mere steps from the heart of Commercial Drive. Tucked on a peaceful section of Victoria Dr, this residence shines with impressive finishes: oak plank flooring, quartz counters, integrated Miele appliances, A/C, and spa-like baths. The main level provides an open concept with over-height ceilings & ample natural light. The 2nd level houses two bedrooms & laundry, while the 3rd has a spacious primary suite, huge walk-in closet, marble walk-in shower with rain head, & private retreat deck with lovely mountain views. Built in 2019, this well-run complex includes parking & storage. Incredible location - walk to everything! Parks, cafes, shops and transit.
